# seed

**Instance Property**

The value that determines the specific configuration of noise produced by the noise source.

## Declaration

```swift
var seed: Int32 { get set }
```

## Discussion

Like the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKARC4RandomSource/seed] value of a random source, a noise source’s seed value determines the pseudorandom aspect of noise generated by the noise source. Changing the seed value produces different overall structure to the generated noise, while changing other parameters produces variation upon that structure.

## Managing Noise Generation Parameters

- **frequency**: A value that determines the size and spacing of features in generated noise.
- **octaveCount**: The number of octaves of the underlying noise function to use for generating noise.
- **lacunarity**: The rate at which successive octaves of the noise function increase in frequency.
